PIOTR BENTKOWSKI, PhD

> Computational biologist & modeller. Coding in Python & learning Julia

© 2026. All rights reserved.

Welcome!

 

 

I am a computational biologist with experience in computer simulation and data analysis in evolutionary biology, epidemiology and biomedical science. My original background is in ecology and physics.

Currently, I work at the Military Institute of Medicine - National Research Institute as a software and data engineer at the Regional Digital Medicine Centre. My work focuses on making large sets of health-related data available for academic and clinical research.

After hours, I am involved in nature conservation.

Feel free to contact me if you’d like to connect.
